MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Feb-01-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Emma E. Nelson-Munson, Esq., of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for Plaintiff / opposing party Larry Lee

RULING:
DEFENDANT PERINI CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT

No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Perini Corporation's motion for summary judgment and alternate motion for summary adjudication are denied. Defendant failed to sustain its burden of production that plaintiff does not possess and cannot reasonably obtain evidence that he was exposed to asbestos-containing products or materials attributable to defendant. Plaintiff's deposition testimony and responses to defendant's special interrogatories preclude defendant from successfully invoking the factually devoid prong of Aguilar. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Jennifer Seelenbacher, CSR #11878 = (503/TLJ)
